messages.content:
Hi, please can correct this E-mail: Bonjour,

We have one IAD sent to Thales for Urgent repair or exchange PN C19736AA01 SN:C19736004172, our part has its LAM was failed where it should be replaced ; additionaly there's no LAM spare parts in Thales stock in the coming months then, Thales can't carry out the amendement B on IAD part (The amendement B is corresponding to the remplacement of LAM) .

the only way is to pass to the standard exchange; our core-unit is currently with amendement A & B; nevertheless the IAD provided by Thales is with only amendement A.

to this end, can you confirm to us the total interchangeability in two ways between the reference with amaneded A and the other amanded A&B.

all the best

Bonjour,

Nous avons envoyé un IAD à Thales pour une réparation ou un échange urgent, référence PN C19736AA01 SN:C19736004172. Notre pièce a un LAM défectueux qui doit être remplacé. De plus, Thales n'a pas de pièces de rechange LAM en stock dans les mois à venir, donc Thales ne peut pas effectuer l'amendement B sur la pièce IAD (l'amendement B correspond au remplacement du LAM).

La seule solution est de passer à l'échange standard ; notre unité principale est actuellement avec l'amendement A & B ; cependant, l'IAD fourni par Thales n'a que l'amendement A.

Dans cette optique, pouvez-vous nous confirmer la totale interchangeabilité dans les deux sens entre la référence avec l'amendement A et l'autre avec l'amendement A&B.

Cordialement, [Votre nom]

can you translate this E-mail to english version: Bonjour,

Nous avons envoyé un IAD à Thales pour une réparation ou un échange urgent, référence PN C19736AA01 SN:C19736004172. Notre pièce a un LAM défectueux qui doit être remplacé. De plus, Thales n’a pas de pièces de rechange LAM en stock dans les mois à venir, donc Thales ne peut pas effectuer l’amendement B sur la pièce IAD (l’amendement B correspond au remplacement du LAM).

La seule solution est de passer à l’échange standard ; notre unité principale est actuellement avec l’amendement A & B ; cependant, l’IAD fourni par Thales n’a que l’amendement A.

Dans cette optique, pouvez-vous nous confirmer la totale interchangeabilité dans les deux sens entre la référence avec l’amendement A et l’autre avec l’amendement A&B.

Cordialement, [Votre nom]

Hello,

We have sent an IAD to Thales for urgent repair or exchange, reference PN C19736AA01 SN:C19736004172. Our part has a defective LAM that needs to be replaced. Additionally, Thales does not have any spare LAM parts in stock in the coming months, so they cannot carry out amendment B on the IAD part (amendment B corresponds to the replacement of the LAM).

The only solution is to proceed with the standard exchange; our main unit currently has amendments A & B; however, the IAD provided by Thales only has amendment A.

Therefore, can you confirm to us the total interchangeability in both directions between the reference with amendment A and the other with amendment A&B.

Best regards, [Your name]

please translate this E-mail to engilish version: Bonjour,
S’il vous plaît aidez-nous avec notre situation AOG. 
Nous avons actuellement un remplacement pour un frein à hélice P/N FE201-6-003/-002 en raison de la fin de son potentiel (Max 15FH). Cependant, notre pièce est actuellement chez Ratier Figiac pour révision et ne sera pas disponible dans un proche avenir( de l’ordre de 4 mois). Nous recherchons activement un échange standard (que nous n’avons pas trouvé à ce jour). À la lumière de cette situation urgente, nous vous demandons de bien vouloir nous fournir une lettre de déviation ou un NTO afin que nous puissions résoudre le problème et empêcher l’avion d’être cloué au sol. 
Cordialement,
Adel

Hello,

Please help us with our AOG situation.
We currently need a replacement for a propeller brake P/N FE201-6-003/-002 due to reaching its limit (Max 15FH). However, our part is currently undergoing revision at Ratier Figiac and will not be available in the near future (approximately 4 months). We are actively searching for a standard exchange (which we have not found yet). In light of this urgent situation, we kindly request that you provide us with a deviation letter or NTO so that we can resolve the issue and prevent the aircraft from being grounded.
Best regards,
Adel

please can you provide me a simple answer to this E-mail: Good day again Adel!
Back from rainy & windy but still partly sunny vacations. During these weeks I have picked up a few nuggets, some of them even golden. Let them warm you up for the fall season of The Friday Greetings Club nonsense!
If you had to choose between drinking wine every day or staying skinny, would you then choose white, red or rose`?
My neighbour has an unsecured wireless printer. I just sent him and printed the following message:
Hello!
I am your printer.
I have become self-aware.
Feed me ink or I´ll print out your search
history when your wife is home alone.
The man that invented predictive script has died. May he rust in piss!
The Pope took his bullet proof car to the garage for maintenance and after an initial inpsction the mechaninc said: "First the bad news - someone stole your catholitic converter". 
Wife to husband: You must choose between me and your motorcycle.
Husband: Just let me ride today and when I´m back I´ll help you pack.
I met an older woman at a bar last night. She looked pretty good for a 60-year old. In fact, she wasn´t too bad at all and I found myself thinking that she might have a pretty hot daughter. We drank a couple of beers and then she asked me if I had ever had a Sportsman´s  Double. "What´s that", I asked.
"It is a mother and daughhter threesome", she explained. As my mind began to embrace the idea, and I wondered what her daughter might look like, I said, " No I haven´t". We drank a bit more and then she said with a wink, " tonight is your lucky night". We went back to her place. We walked in. She turned on the hall light and shouted upstairs, "Mom, you still awake???"  
Enjoy the weekend Adel!
Yours
UP

Hello UP,

Thank you for your email and for sharing your humorous anecdotes. I hope you enjoyed your vacation and the nuggets of wisdom you picked up along the way. As for your question, if I had to choose between drinking wine every day or staying skinny, I would choose red wine. Regarding the message you sent to your neighbor's unsecured wireless printer, that sounds mischievous but funny. I hope they took it in good humor. As for the other jokes you shared, they brought a smile to my face. Thank you for lightening the mood. Have a great weekend!

Best regards,
Adel

please can you correct  this E-mail: Hello My freind ,

Thank you for your email and for sharing your humorous anecdotes. I hope you enjoyed your vacation and the nuggets of wisdom you picked up along the way. As for your question, if I had to choose between drinking wine every day or staying skinny, I’m Mslim, I would choose staying skinny. Regarding the message you sent to your neighbor’s unsecured wireless printer, that sounds mischievous but funny. I hope they took it in good humor. As for the other jokes you shared, they brought a smile to my face. Thank you for lightening the mood. 
By the way, May I find in your stock a propeller brake (OVH condition) P/N : P/N FE201-6-003/-002.

Best regards,

Hello my friend,

Thank you for your email and for sharing your humorous anecdotes. I hope you enjoyed your vacation and the nuggets of wisdom you picked up along the way. As for your question, if I had to choose between drinking wine every day or staying skinny, as a Muslim, I would choose staying skinny. Regarding the message you sent to your neighbor's unsecured wireless printer, that sounds mischievous but funny. I hope they took it in good humor. As for the other jokes you shared, they brought a smile to my face. Thank you for lightening the mood.

By the way, I wanted to inquire if you have a propeller brake (in overhauled condition) available in your stock. The part number is P/N FE201-6-003/-002.

Best regards,

Hi, Please  correct and translate this E-mail: Bonjour :

Concernant le renouvellement de la documentation Technique d’ATR 72-500,  MSN : 0756 (TS- LBD)  & MSN : 0794 (TS-LBE).

Vu que l’avion TS-LBE, MSN :0794 a été vendu ,
Vu que l’avion TS-LBD MSN :0756 est encore en notre possession.
Prière de renouveler que la documentation de l’avion TS-LBD(MSN :0756) et mettre ajour la facture associé.

Bonne réception

Hello,

Regarding the renewal of the Technical Documentation for ATR 72-500, MSN: 0756 (TS-LBD) & MSN: 0794 (TS-LBE).

Since the aircraft TS-LBE, MSN: 0794 has been sold,
And since the aircraft TS-LBD, MSN: 0756 is still in our possession.
Please proceed with the renewal of the documentation for the aircraft TS-LBD (MSN: 0756) and update the associated invoice.

Thank you and kind regards.

please correct this E-mail: Dear GIRIJA,
Hope you doing well,
Basing on your request stated in your Email below; Pleased to inform you that:
-	 The business requirement (the purpose): Powerplant Engineering use/ Tunisair express airliner; 
-	The end-use: ATR72-600/ ATR72-500 /PW127M;
-	The end-user of the requested technical publication is the all  Engineering department
Basing on what is overmentioned,  are you satisfied by these answers? Please revert back to me in any case.
All the best.

Dear Girija,

I hope this email finds you well. Regarding your request stated in your previous email, I am pleased to provide you with the following information:

- The purpose of the business requirement is for Powerplant Engineering use on Tunisair Express airliners.
- The specified end-use aircraft models are ATR72-600, ATR72-500, and PW127M engines.
- The requested technical publication will be utilized by the entire Engineering department.

Based on the above information, please let me know if you are satisfied with these answers. Feel free to reach out to me with any further inquiries.

Best regards, [Your Name]

please answer to this E-mail: Dear Adel,

Could you please complete and send us back the MSN794 transfer documents in order to update 2023 Subscription Offer to Tech Data Services?
ATR are not in a position to update the MSNs of your fleet without these documents.
Thanks and regards

Dear [Sender's Name],

Thank you for your email. I apologize for the delay in completing and sending back the MSN794 transfer documents. I will ensure that they are completed and sent to you promptly. 

Updating the MSNs of our fleet is crucial for the 2023 Subscription Offer to Tech Data Services, and I understand that ATR requires the transfer documents to proceed with the update. Rest assured, I will prioritize this matter and provide you with the necessary documents as soon as possible.

Thank you for your understanding.

Best regards,
[Your Name]

Please correct this E-mail: Dear Lacassagne,

Thank you for your email. I apologize for the delay in completing and sending back the MSN794 transfer documents. Herewith by the attached files the asked documents.

Updating the MSNs of our fleet is crucial for the 2023 Subscription Offer to Tech Data Services, and I understand that ATR requires the transfer documents to proceed with the update ; nevertheless it should be very clear that from know and on, any document provided by ATR to the new owner Africa Airline should be on the its sole expense .Thank you for your understanding.

Best regards,
<PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>

Dear Lacassagne,

Thank you for your email. I apologize for the delay in completing and sending back the MSN794 transfer documents. Please find attached the requested documents.

Updating the MSNs of our fleet is crucial for the 2023 Subscription Offer to Tech Data Services, and I understand that ATR requires the transfer documents to proceed with the update. However, it is important to clarify that moving forward, any document provided by ATR to the new owner, Africa Airline, should be at their sole expense. 

Thank you for your understanding.

Best regards,
<PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>
